title: Fix image upload not saving to backend for products

requirements.text: Update the backend product type to include an `image` field (of type `Text`) so that image data can be persisted alongside product details. Update all related CRUD functions (add, edit, get) to handle this new field.

quotes: uploading but not saving, error occuring

acceptanceCriteria: The Product type in main.mo includes an `image : Text` field
The addProduct function accepts and stores the image field
The updateProduct function accepts and persists the image field
Existing products without images default to an empty string or placeholder without breaking

requirements.text: Fix the Admin page product form so that the base64-encoded image string captured from the file upload input is correctly included in the payload sent to the backend addProduct and updateProduct mutations. Ensure no error occurs on save and that the saved image persists and reloads correctly in the edit dialog.

quotes: uploading but not saving, error occuring

acceptanceCriteria: Uploading an image in the Add Product dialog and clicking Save stores the product including the image without error
Uploading an image in the Edit Product dialog and clicking Save updates the product including the new image without error
After saving, the product's image is visible in the product list and product detail page
Re-opening the edit dialog for a product with an image shows the previously uploaded image preview
No console errors or unhandled exceptions occur during the upload and save flow

requirements.text: Update the product display components (ProductCard, ProductDetail, Catalog) to render the product's stored image when available, falling back gracefully to the existing placeholder when no image is present.

quotes: uploading but not saving, error occuring

acceptanceCriteria: A product with a saved image displays that image in the product card on catalog pages
A product with a saved image displays that image on the product detail page
Products without an image continue to display a placeholder without errors

constraints: Do not break existing product, cart, or order data — handle migration safely for products that lack an image field
Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
nonGoals: External image hosting or CDN integration
Image compression or resizing on the backend
Bulk image upload or multi-image per product support
